title: athyrium leiopodum
intro: Athyrium leiopodum, also known as Lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Athyriaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Athyrium leiopodum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
